prompt: Summarize the following text in one sentence: The Ryzen 9 7940HS is a high-end laptop processor from AMD. It features 8 cores and 16 threads, with a boost clock of up to 5.2 GHz. It is built on the Zen 4 architecture and includes an integrated Radeon 780M GPU.
Write a short professional email to a client explaining that their project will be delayed by two days due to a server migration.
Summarize the history of the internet in one sentence.
Write a 4-line poem about artificial intelligence.
Classify the sentiment of this review: 'The food was cold and the service was slow.'
Write a Python function to calculate the factorial of a number.
Summarize the plot of Romeo and Juliet in two sentences.
Write a polite rejection email for a job applicant.
Describe a sunset on Mars in one paragraph.
Translate 'Hello, how are you?' to French.
Summarize the benefits of renewable energy in three bullet points.
Write a follow-up email after a job interview.
Is this text about sports, politics, or science? 'Researchers have discovered a new species of deep-sea fish.'
Write a catchy slogan for a new coffee shop.
Write a CSS rule to center a div horizontally and vertically.
